subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, O Lord of earth and heaven and Sovereign over all names, I testify that Thou hast ever been [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا اله الارض و السماء و المهیمن علی الاسماء اشهد انک لم تزل کنت فی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
